title: spermacoce hassleri
intro: Spermacoce hassleri, also known as "Tetranisia hassleri", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and injuries. The health benefits of Spermacoce hassleri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
